title: crepinia × dumetorum
intro: Crepinia × dumetorum, also known as the Crepinia vine or Wild Yam, is a perennial climber native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic compounds. The health benefits of Crepinia × dumetorum include relief from menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health. Crepinia × dumetorum is often prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be taken as a natural supplement to promote overall well-being.
